message:
feat(ui): implement ActiveFilterChips component for filter visualization

- Add new ActiveFilterChips component displaying active filters as removable chips
- Show search queries with Search icon, categories with Folder icon, tags with Tag icon
- Each chip has X button with proper aria-label for accessibility
- Add "Clear all" link to remove all filters at once
- Include data-testid="filter-chip" for E2E testing
- Component only renders when filters are active (returns null otherwise)
- Integrate component in home page between filters and results sections

Closes beads: jeffreysprompts.com-wi4g

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
